title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.305 - Ghost Army recognition day designated for June 6
text:
9.305.  Ghost Army recognition day designated for June 6. — June sixth is hereby designated as "Ghost Army Recognition Day" in Missouri.  Citizens of this state are encouraged to participate in appropriate events and activities to commemorate the deception missions carried out by the "Ghost Army" that were essential to Allied success in Europe during World War II.
(L. 2020 S.B. 656)
